home.title: rentonhead.dev | Hasan Cemil Acar
home.name: Hasan Cemil Acar
home.bio1: Hey, I'm Hasan — but most people know me as
home.bio1End: . An Art Director and Programmer based between İstanbul and Moscow.
home.bio2: I bridge the gap between design and development to build modern digital products. On the technical side, I create mobile applications with SwiftUI, web experiences with React & Next.js, and robust e-commerce solutions.
home.bio3: On the creative side, I craft visual identities and seamless UI/UX designs using Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite. I love turning abstract ideas into functional, aesthetic, and meaningful digital experiences.
home.imageAlt: Hasan Cemil Acar - Art Director, UI/UX Designer & iOS Developer in Istanbul and Moscow
home.skillsSubtitle: End-to-end digital products — from brand identity to shipping native mobile apps.
home.skill_creative_desc: Building brand identities from scratch with Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator and After Effects — designing mobile and web UI/UX that is both aesthetic and functional.
home.skill_mobile_desc: Building native, performant iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI — with clean, scalable code architecture.
home.skill_web_desc: Coding fast, dynamic and elegant websites with React, Next.js and Tailwind CSS — powered by Python and Firebase on the backend.
home.skill_ecom_desc: Full command of WordPress and WooCommerce — from theme customization to technical infrastructure, delivering turnkey e-commerce projects.
home.skill_seo_desc: Optimizing websites for search with tools like Rank Math, growing visibility through local and global SEO strategies.
home.skill_appstore_desc: Conversion-focused App Store screenshot designs that match a brand's visual language and tell its story.

mobileProjects.brewclock_description: A precision brew timer and guide for coffee enthusiasts. Track your brewing methods, dial in your recipes, and craft the perfect cup — every single time.
mobileProjects.gastromancy_tagline: AI Recipe Assistant — your fridge, your meal.
mobileProjects.gastromancy_description: An AI-powered home cooking assistant that turns the ingredients you already have into real recipes in seconds. Mood-based recipe styles, dietary filters, voice-guided cooking, weekly menus and a smart pantry tracker.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_p1: Hasan Cemil Acar ("we", "our", or "us") built the BrewClock app. This SERVICE is provided by Hasan Cemil Acar and is intended for use as is. This page is used to inform users regarding our policies with the collection, use, and disclosure of Personal Information if anyone decides to use our Service.
privacy.s1_p2: By choosing to use our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in relation to this policy.
privacy.s2_intro: BrewClock is designed as a coffee timer and data storage application. To provide a better experience while using our Service, we may require you to provide us with certain information. The information that we request will be retained and used as described in this privacy policy.
privacy.s2_local_desc: Most of your brewing data, timers, and preferences are saved locally on your device to ensure maximum privacy and fast access.
privacy.s2_cloud_desc: The app may utilize native cloud services (such as Apple iCloud) to sync your data across your personal devices. We do not have direct access to, nor do we collect, your personal iCloud data on our own servers.
privacy.s2_location_desc: BrewClock may request access to your device's location to help you find nearby coffee shops. Location data is used only within the app in real time and is not transmitted to our servers or shared with third parties.
privacy.s2_photo_desc: BrewClock may request access to your photo library to allow you to add images to your coffee bean entries and save recipe cards. Photos are stored locally on your device and are not uploaded to our servers.
privacy.s3_content: BrewClock uses RevenueCat to process in-app purchases and subscriptions. RevenueCat may collect purchase history and device identifiers to manage your subscription status.
privacy.s3_link: Please refer to RevenueCat's Privacy Policy for more information.
privacy.s4_content: BrewClock offers premium features through auto-renewing subscriptions. You can manage and cancel your subscriptions at any time through your Apple ID account settings. If you cancel your subscription, you will continue to have access to the premium features until the end of your current billing period.
privacy.s5_content: We want to inform you that whenever you use our Service, in a case of an error in the app, we collect data and information (through standard first-party or third-party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol ("IP") address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing our Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other diagnostic statistics. This data is used solely to improve the app's stability and performance.
privacy.s6_content: We value your trust in providing us your Personal Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. Please remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacy.s7_content: These Services do not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13 years of age. If we discover that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we immediately delete this from our records. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so that we will be able to take the necessary actions.
privacy.s8_content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Thus, you are advised to review this page periodically for any changes. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. These changes are effective immediately after they are posted on this page.
privacy.s9_content: If you have any questions, concerns, or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us directly.
